description: 图片切片、错位排版、大字标题和编辑杂志感

identity.composition: 编辑杂志跨页感：大字标题、图片切片、错位色块和窄栏正文形成受控张力。
identity.hierarchy: 章节编号与大标题主导；短导语、侧注、引文和数字像杂志标注一样穿插。
identity.image_treatment: 多比例切片、局部放大、套色或半调效果；每张图仍保留来源和说明。
identity.module_language: 纸片叠放、裁切边、细线框、色块标签、上下错位与编辑脚注。
identity.chart_evidence: 数字成为版式元素；小型图表与表格嵌入图文流，直接标注而不使用仪表盘卡片。
identity.motion: 切片从不同短方向进入，标题与图片分步揭示；保持可读节奏，禁用持续漂移。

font_stacks.display: Impact, Arial Black, PingFang SC, sans-serif
font_stacks.body: Georgia, Source Han Serif SC, serif

canvas.grid: asymmetric 10-column editorial grid with controlled overlaps
canvas.density: medium, varied text-image rhythm and deliberate empty paper

layout_variants.use: numbers, source excerpt, and compact table
priority sequence and memorable closing line

components.chart: Turn 1-3 key numbers into typographic anchors; use compact annotated bars or lines in the surrounding editorial flow.
components.table: Use narrow editorial columns, strong top/bottom rules, compact rows, and a colored margin note for the takeaway.
components.evidence_card: Treat the artifact as a clipped page with source caption; overlap a separate interpretation note without covering evidence.
components.image: Use two or three purposeful crops, duotone or natural color, varied aspect ratios, visible caption, and no generic decoration.

motion.stagger: alternate headline, image slice, and note groups
